purpose: Route skill-package authoring requests to leaf skill creation or router-family creation.
selection_order: Leaf skill or single-job package -> create-skill
Router family with nested children and install-or-fallback behavior -> create-router-skill

children.name: create-skill
children.summary: Creates or upgrades reusable leaf skill packages.
route_when: The package is a single repeatable job rather than a family router.
The work needs portable leaf guidance, references, scripts, assets, or evals but not child selection.
avoid_when: The package's main job is routing among children.
The work needs explicit child metadata, install hints, or fallback behavior.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically.

children.name: create-router-skill
children.summary: Creates or upgrades discoverable router skills with explicit child inventories.
route_when: The package's main job is choosing among child skills.
The family boundary, child order, or install-or-fallback behavior must be explicit.
avoid_when: The work is a leaf skill with one repeatable job.
The package would only be a category label or umbrella without decision logic.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically.
